quests.start_text: Guide: Start the Village Supply Run: cook food, smelt a bar, smith and equip a weapon, defeat an enemy, use the bank and shop, then return.
quests.completed_text: Guide: The village is safer because of you.
quests.completion_text: Quest complete: Starter path. Reward: 50 coins, +40 Smithing XP.

quests.start_text: Warden: Chop wood, craft and equip a bow, clear one wolf, bank the spoils, buy a trail ration, then return.
quests.completed_text: Warden: The trail supply loop holds now.
quests.completion_text: Quest complete: Trail supplies. Reward: 35 coins, +20 Carpentry XP.

quests.start_text: Steward: Cook the catch, bank the meal, and keep the field crew fed for the shift.
quests.in_progress_text: Steward: The stores are not ready yet. Still needed: {missing_objectives}.
quests.completed_text: Steward: The crew can work through the morning now.
quests.completion_text: Quest complete: Field provisions. Reward: 25 coins, +20 Cooking XP.

quests.start_text: Scout: Buy a cheap supply, equip it, bank the spare coin, and clear one road threat before you report back.
quests.in_progress_text: Scout: The watch is not done yet. Still needed: {missing_objectives}.
quests.completed_text: Scout: The road holds steady for now.
quests.completion_text: Quest complete: Road watch. Reward: 30 coins, +20 Attack XP.

quests.start_text: Forge Keeper: Smelt a bar, smith gear, equip it, clear one threat, and bank the patrol pay before the next shift.
quests.in_progress_text: Forge Keeper: The reserve is still short. Still needed: {missing_objectives}.
quests.completed_text: Forge Keeper: The reserve rack can hold through another shift now.
quests.completion_text: Quest complete: Forge reserve. Reward: 45 coins, +30 Smithing XP, +20 Attack XP.

quests.start_text: Workshop Keeper: Turn logs into a plank, charcoal, and clean splinters so the village stock stays useful.
quests.in_progress_text: Workshop Keeper: The order is not filled yet. Still needed: {missing_objectives}.
quests.completed_text: Workshop Keeper: The workbench has what it needs now.
quests.completion_text: Quest complete: Workshop order. Reward: 24 coins, +24 Carpentry XP.

quests.start_text: Practice Mentor: Craft a bow and staff from village wood so the yard can train every style.
quests.in_progress_text: Practice Mentor: The practice rack is still short. Still needed: {missing_objectives}.
quests.completed_text: Practice Mentor: The practice rack is ready for new drills.
quests.completion_text: Quest complete: Practice gear. Reward: 35 coins, +30 Carpentry XP.

quests.start_text: Meadow Herbalist: Gather one herb, bank it, and I will trade you a tonic and a gem.
quests.in_progress_text: Meadow Herbalist: Keep the herb banked and return when it is stored. Still needed: {missing_objectives}.
quests.completed_text: Meadow Herbalist: The tonic holds. The gem is yours.
quests.completion_text: Quest complete: Meadow remedy. Reward: 1 Meadow potion, 1 Meadow gem, +30 Herbalism XP.

quests.start_text: River Fisher: Start the River Meal Run with one clean catch, then bring it back.
quests.completed_text: River Fisher: Good catch. The line looks steady now.
quests.completion_text: Quest complete: First cast. Reward: 25 coins, +15 Fishing XP.

quests.start_text: Dock Hand: Continue the River Meal Run: catch one fish, bank it, and keep the dock stocked for the next haul.
quests.in_progress_text: Dock Hand: Keep the catch moving. Still needed: {missing_objectives}.
quests.completed_text: Dock Hand: Good. The dock stays stocked when the catch is packed.
quests.completion_text: Quest complete: River stock. Reward: 15 coins, +10 Fishing XP.

quests.start_text: Kitchen Runner: Finish the River Meal Run: cook the catch, bank the meal, and keep the pantry moving.
quests.in_progress_text: Kitchen Runner: The meal is not ready yet. Still needed: {missing_objectives}.
quests.completed_text: Kitchen Runner: Good. A packed meal is easier to hand out.
quests.completion_text: Quest complete: Field meal. Reward: 18 coins, +12 Cooking XP.

quests.start_text: Carpentry Helper: Turn logs into a plank, a handle, and a bow. That is how the bench pays off.
quests.in_progress_text: Carpentry Helper: The bench still has work left. Still needed: {missing_objectives}.
quests.completed_text: Carpentry Helper: Good. Now the bench has a proper starter kit.
quests.completion_text: Quest complete: Workbench tools. Reward: 20 coins, +18 Carpentry XP.

quests.start_text: Road Guard: Buy a cheap supply, equip it, clear one threat, bank the spoils, and keep the road clear.
quests.in_progress_text: Road Guard: The patrol is not done yet. Still needed: {missing_objectives}.
quests.completed_text: Road Guard: Good. The road loop is working now.
quests.completion_text: Quest complete: Road patrol. Reward: 24 coins, +20 Attack XP.

quests.start_text: Scout: Gather bog reeds, bank them, and keep the marsh stock moving.
quests.completed_text: Scout: The reed stack is ready for the next run.
quests.completion_text: Quest complete: Bog reeds. Reward: 30 coins, +20 Foraging XP.

quests.start_text: Brewer: Start the Mire Tonic Run: weave the reeds into a tonic, then buy one from the shop.
quests.completed_text: Brewer: The tonic works. The shop can keep the supply steady.
quests.completion_text: Quest complete: Mire tonic. Reward: 35 coins, +25 Herbalism XP.

quests.start_text: Guard: Continue the Mire Tonic Run by bringing down one mire bat, banking the spoils, and reporting back.
quests.completed_text: Guard: Good. The bats are not crowding the path now.
quests.completion_text: Quest complete: Mire watch. Reward: 40 coins, +24 Attack XP.

quests.start_text: Scout: Gather fen reeds, bank them, and keep the reed bundles ready.
quests.in_progress_text: Scout: The reed stack is still short. Still needed: {missing_objectives}.
quests.completed_text: Scout: Good. The fen baskets are ready for the next pull.
quests.completion_text: Quest complete: Fen reeds. Reward: 32 coins, +18 Foraging XP.

quests.start_text: Brewer: Brew a fen tonic, then buy one from the shop.
quests.completed_text: Brewer: Good. The shop can keep the fen stock moving.
quests.completion_text: Quest complete: Fen tonic. Reward: 38 coins, +22 Herbalism XP.

quests.start_text: Guard: Bring down one fen crawler, bank the spoils, and report back.
quests.completed_text: Guard: Good. The crawler line has been pushed back.
quests.completion_text: Quest complete: Fen watch. Reward: 42 coins, +24 Attack XP.
